$schema_comment: Hooks automate verification and committing. The harness executes these — agents cannot skip them.

hooks.description: After every file edit, run the test suite and show a summary.
After every file edit, check DESIGN.md conformance (fast feedback; the hard gate is init.sh).
If a feature just moved to done in feature_list.json, create a conventional commit. No-op otherwise. Never pushes.

hooks.command: ./init.sh > /tmp/harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] init.sh OK' || (echo '[harness] init.sh FAILED — check /tmp/harness_init.log before closing' && cat /tmp/harness_init.log | tail -20)
hooks.description: Before closing the session, force a full verification pass (includes the DESIGN.md gate).
